random.label: Random Falsification
random.description: Scales and offsets sensor readings with arbitrary values

replay.label: Replay Attack
replay.description: Replays legitimate past readings to mask tampering

stealthy.label: Stealthy Bias Injection
stealthy.description: Injects a slowly increasing bias that's hard to detect

noise.label: Noise Injection
noise.description: Adds large Gaussian noise simulating sensor malfunction

targeted.label: Targeted Attack
targeted.description: Attacks the highest-impact sensors in the network
